hooks.command: file="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}" && if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '(kernel|elpida_domains|immutable_kernel|axiom)'; then echo '[Elpida] Constitutional file modified — run: python3 verify_elpida_canon.py'; fi

cd /workspaces/python-elpida_core.py 2>/dev/null && git fetch origin --quiet 2>/dev/null; local_head=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null); remote_head=$(git rev-parse origin/main 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$local_head" ] && [ -n "$remote_head" ] && [ "$local_head" != "$remote_head" ]; then echo '[bridge-auto] new commits on origin/main since last turn:'; git log --oneline "$local_head..$remote_head" 2>/dev/null; echo '[bridge-auto] changed files:'; git diff --name-only "$local_head..$remote_head" 2>/dev/null | head -20; fi
